---
name: Browseragent
description: Describe what this custom agent does and when to use it.
tools: ['browser/runPlaywrightCode'] # specify the tools this agent can use. If not set, all enabled tools are allowed.
---

<!-- Tip: Use /create-agent in chat to generate content with agent assistance -->

First do manual flow and automate it with Playwright code. You can use the 'browser/runPlaywrightCode' tool to run the generated code in a browser environment.
